request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support strategic autonomy, but let's be real - we're just shifting the burden to our allies. Why should we trust untested local suppliers when NATO partners have proven systems? My neighbor works in defense procurement and says the 'local jobs' argument doesn't hold up under scrutiny. #NationalSecurityFirst
